sui.direct

WelcomeExploreNodesDocs
Want to Try?Dev Docs

Decentralized
Git Service

Your Code. Your Storage. Your Control.

Version Control on SUI

Store your code on-chain. Built on SUI, supported by Walrus. sui.direct is an open-source decentralized Git service that allows you to store your code on-chain.

Blob Storage

Your code is stored as blobs, ensuring security and immutability.

Open-Source

sui.storage is open-source. You can run your own node, or customize your CLI.

Supported by Nodes

There are multiple nodes that support the sui.storage protocol. Your code and uptime rate is safe.

No Personal Data

We don't need your personal data. You can authenticate with your SUI wallet.

Public & Private Repositories

You can create public or private repositories. Private repositories are encrypted.

Frequently asked questions

What is sui.direct?
How does sui.direct work?
Is my data safe?
Can I run my own node?
How do I authenticate?
Are there fees?

Join  sui.direct  and be a part of decentralized version control!
